description_long: This is a sleek, modern knife with a sharply curved, single-edged blade and a distinctive handle featuring three large circular cutouts and a hexagonal end. The blade is thin and tapers to a fine point, suggesting it is designed for precision cutting or slicing. The entire object appears to be constructed from a single piece of dark, glossy metal, giving it a monolithic and minimalist appearance. The handle's cutouts likely reduce weight and provide a unique grip, while the absence of a guard or additional grip material emphasizes its streamlined design. There are no visible engravings, patterns, or decorative elements, reinforcing its utilitarian and contemporary aesthetic. The overall form is compact and lightweight, suitable for quick, agile use in urban or kitchen environments.
description: A modern, curved knife with a single-edged blade and a handle featuring three large circular cutouts, all in glossy dark metal. The design is minimalist and functional, with no ornamentation or guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved blade and three large circular cutouts in the handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the curved blade and handle cutouts.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, emphasizing the slim profile.
attribute_handle_design: integral handle with three large circular cutouts, hexagonal end, smooth metal surface
